video.description: Input video file to be upscaled
video.title: Video

upscale_factor.description: Factor to upscale the video by (e.g. 2.0 doubles width and height)
upscale_factor.title: Upscale Factor

target_fps.description: Target frames per second for interpolation
target_fps.title: Target Fps

H264_output.description: Use H264 codec instead of H265 (default is H265)
H264_output.title: H264 Output
